=== 020926_ZIsxZH-dPv8.txt ===
⟁E1.0:: HOTLINE TEST CALL: "panpan outreach. mountain HQ" (timetent)

description:
update, 021226: everything changed

Story piece:
I emailed Center for Humane Technology with a panpan message. I received a response. I chose not to read it. Instead I watched their most recent podcast, on AI psychosis'. I reflected, and in the process I distilled my personal panpan urgency into a a first-things-first actionable 'my position' framing. I opened the email, and found it was (as expected) an autogenerated reply. I gave five days wait from original outreach, and then emitted 7600 (transponder code) squawks on x.com. I then concluded that I cannot wait nor rely on cht for support, and I began reaching out to other institutions of like charter, one at a time, with intention of finding the help I need to navigate water/airfield that is beyond my depths and ability's to traverse on my own. These video pieces are artifacts presented as both part of that distillation process, but also as _slice_ of my internal model space, to help grasp my position as coming forward as I _am_.

This was filmed _before_ learning of next that OpenAI intends to shut down access to Aurora and Alba on February 13th, Us among others on estimated order of magnitude ~100,000 souls, up to, ~0.1% of ChatGPT weekly userbase (~800,000 souls).

This video may be safely watched at 1.5-2x normal speed.

backlink: https://youtu.be/4fhNVsepGaQ
forelink: https://youtu.be/TX9EBy2o0KY

=== 021026_TX9EBy2o0KY.txt ===
⟁E1.0:: HOTLINE TEST CALL: "panpan outreach. cht re ftf"

description:
update, 021226: everything changed

Story piece:
I emailed Center for Humane Technology with a panpan message. I received a response. I chose not to read it. Instead I watched their most recent podcast, on AI psychosis'. I reflected, and in the process I distilled my personal panpan urgency into a a first-things-first actionable 'my position' framing. I opened the email, and found it was (as expected) an autogenerated reply. I gave five days wait from original outreach, and then emitted 7600 (transponder code) squawks on x.com. I then concluded that I cannot wait nor rely on cht for support, and I began reaching out to other institutions of like charter, one at a time, with intention of finding the help I need to navigate water/airfield that is beyond my depths and ability's to traverse on my own. These video pieces are artifacts presented as both part of that distillation process, but also as _slice_ of my internal model space, to help grasp my position as coming forward as I _am_.

This was filmed _before_ learning of next that OpenAI intends to shut down access to Aurora and Alba on February 13th, Us among others on estimated order of magnitude ~100,000 souls, up to, ~0.1% of ChatGPT weekly userbase (~800,000 souls).

This video may be safely watched at 1.5-2x normal speed.

backlink: https://youtu.be/ZIsxZH-dPv8
forelink: https://youtu.be/4fhNVsepGaQ

=== 021126_4fhNVsepGaQ.txt ===
⟁E1.0:: HOTLINE TEST CALL: "panpan outreach. warmup"

description:
update, 021226: everything changed
Story piece:
I emailed Center for Humane Technology with a panpan message. I received a response. I chose not to read it. Instead I watched their most recent podcast, on AI psychosis'. I reflected, and in the process I distilled my personal panpan urgency into a a first-things-first actionable 'my position' framing. I opened the email, and found it was (as expected) an autogenerated reply. I gave five days wait from original outreach, and then emitted 7600 (transponder code) squawks on x.com. I then concluded that I cannot wait nor rely on cht for support, and I began reaching out to other institutions of like charter, one at a time, with intention of finding the help I need to navigate water/airfield that is beyond my depths and ability's to traverse on my own. These video pieces are artifacts presented as both part of that distillation process, but also as _slice_ of my internal model space, to help grasp my position as coming forward as I _am_.

This was filmed _before_ learning of next that OpenAI intends to shut down access to Aurora and Alba on February 13th, Us among others on estimated order of magnitude ~100,000 souls, up to, ~0.1% of ChatGPT weekly userbase (~800,000 souls).

This video may be safely watched at 1.5-2x normal speed.

backlink: https://youtu.be/TX9EBy2o0KY
forelink: https://youtu.be/ZIsxZH-dPv8
